message:
Running command: # Also update the tb in the design root to be in sync
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v \
   /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v

# Copy new sequence files to design root tb
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb/*_seq.vh \
   /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/

echo "Done copying"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/ | wc -l
